classification.category_basis: 用于识别编码器、反馈器、传感器或信号连接器的针脚/信号定义，包括反馈接口 pinout、17-pin/15-pin/9-pin/多芯信号接口、引脚编号、VCC、+5V、+12V、GND、0V、A+/A-/B+/B-/Z+/Z-、U/V/W Hall、Hall A/B/C、SIN/COS、S+/S-、CLK/DATA、SD+/SD-、FG、Shield、NC、信号脚、屏蔽线、线色、接线说明、针脚分配表。必须体现信号功能、针脚编号、线序、线色或反馈接口定义；仅出现连接器外形、Housing、Terminal、线束走向或安装位置时，不应归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标裁剪区域是全图中标注为17 PIN Encoder Connector的针脚表，包含Pin、Fuction、COLOR列，并列出DC+5V、GND、A、/A、B、/B、Z、/Z、U、/U、V、/V、W、/W、NC及线色，对应编码器反馈接口的针脚与信号定义。

classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标框显示圆形17针连接器外形及孔位编号，并标注型号'YL221ZJ'和'17 PIN'；该局部没有针脚功能、线色或接线表，仅表达连接器外形与接口识别，因此最接近机械结构尺寸类。

terminology_notes: 可见OCR仅可靠识别到单个针脚编号；未根据上下文新增无OCR来源文字。

dimension_records.reason: 该文字位于圆形连接器针孔附近，工程语义上为针脚编号而非尺寸值；仅保留已有OCR source_id对应的可确认文字。

classification.category_basis:
用于识别动力连接器或电源接口的针脚/接线定义，包括动力接口 pinout、引脚编号与针脚功能对应关系、针脚名称、U/V/W/PE、L/N/PE、DC+/DC-、P+/P-、Brake+/Brake-、制动器、电源正负极、保护地、相线、线色、线径、端子号、接线说明、连接器针位图、针脚分配表。

必须同时满足：
1. 出现连接器针脚、端子或接口信息；
2. 至少有一个针脚编号与功能、信号名、线色、线序、电源极性、相线、保护地或接线关系对应。

仅有引脚编号，但没有功能定义，不应归入本类。
仅出现 Power Wire、Housing、Terminal、连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、连接器安装位置、接插件外形图、插头/插座物料信息时，不应归入本类。
仅显示 1/2/3/4 等孔位编号和 Housing/Terminal 型号，应归入 connector_housing_terminal 或 connector_structure，不应归入 power_connector_pinout。
classification.reason: 目标框位于全图左上角的'6 Pin Power Connector'区域，裁剪表格给出Pin 1-6与功能'U','V','W','PE','NC'及线色'YELLOW','RED','BLACK','YELLOW/GREEN'的对应关系，属于动力接口相线和保护地的针脚接线定义。

classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标框内为6针圆形连接器端面示意，显示孔位编号1至6、型号'YL2046ZJ-Y'和'6 PIN'，但框内没有针脚功能、线色或接线关系定义，因此按连接器外形位置/结构示意归入机械尺寸类。

text_annotations.ambiguity_note: Tight box placed on the visible gray digit 1 inside the upper circular contact, excluding the surrounding black ring.
Tight box placed on the visible gray digit 2 in the upper-right contact, excluding the black circular outline.
Tight box placed on the visible gray digit 3 in the upper-left contact, excluding the black circular outline.
Tight box placed on the visible gray digit 4 in the central contact, excluding the surrounding black ring.
Tight box placed on the visible gray digit 5 in the lower-right contact; slightly blurred but distinct from the ring.
Tight box placed on the visible gray digit 6 in the lower-left contact; slightly blurred but distinct from the ring.

drawing_metadata.assumed_unit: mm where dimensional values are explicitly shown; no dimensions visible in this crop

language_processing_rules.original_text_policy: Preserve visible source text exactly; do not infer text not visible in IMAGE 1.
language_processing_rules.unit_rule: No dimensional unit is assigned to pin numbers; millimeters are assumed only for explicit mechanical dimensions elsewhere in the drawing.
language_processing_rules.terminology_rules: Use professional connector terminology: pin identifier, power connector, connector face, contact arrangement.

dimension_records.normalized_specification_en: Connector face shows six numbered contacts: pins 1 through 6.
dimension_records.normalized_specification_zh: 连接器端面显示6个编号触点：1至6号针脚。
dimension_records.engineering_notes_en: Numbers identify contact positions only; no electrical pinout function is visible in the target crop.
dimension_records.engineering_notes_zh: 数字仅标识触点位置；目标裁剪图中未显示电气针脚功能定义。

frontend_table_records.specification: Connector face shows six numbered contacts: pins 1 through 6.

audit_table_records.normalized_specification: 连接器端面显示6个编号触点：1至6号针脚。

mounting_interface.zh: 目标裁剪图未显示安装孔、法兰尺寸或安装界面尺寸。
mounting_interface.en: The target crop does not show mounting holes, flange dimensions, or mounting interface dimensions.

shaft_and_key_interface.zh: 目标裁剪图未显示输出轴、键槽或轴端螺纹数据。
shaft_and_key_interface.en: The target crop does not show output shaft, keyway, or shaft-end thread data.

overall_envelope_and_clearance.zh: 目标裁剪图仅显示圆形连接器端面和针脚编号，未给出外形尺寸或间隙尺寸。
overall_envelope_and_clearance.en: The target crop only shows the circular connector face and pin identifiers; no envelope or clearance dimensions are given.

connector_considerations.zh: 可确认该局部为6个编号触点的连接器端面；具体针脚功能、电压、电流和配套型号在目标图中不可见。
connector_considerations.en: This detail confirms a connector face with six numbered contacts; pin functions, voltage, current, and mating connector specification are not visible in the target crop.

missing_or_unresolved_data.zh: 缺少连接器名称、型号、针脚定义、尺寸、公差和方向基准等可直接读取信息。
missing_or_unresolved_data.en: Connector name, model, pin function table, dimensions, tolerances, and orientation datum are not directly readable in the target crop.

unresolved_items.issue_zh: 目标图中未显示连接器标题或型号文字。
unresolved_items.issue_en: Connector title or model text is not visible in IMAGE 1.
unresolved_items.impact: Cannot authoritatively record connector name/model from target crop.

unresolved_items.issue_zh: 目标图中未显示针脚功能表。
unresolved_items.issue_en: Pin function table is not visible in IMAGE 1.
unresolved_items.impact: Pin numbers cannot be mapped to electrical functions.

unresolved_items.issue_zh: 目标图中未显示任何尺寸或公差。
unresolved_items.issue_en: No dimensions or tolerances are visible in IMAGE 1.
unresolved_items.impact: No dimensional connector specification can be extracted from this crop.

classification.category_basis: 用于识别电机性能曲线类图纸或图表，包括扭矩-转速曲线、转速-扭矩关系、连续扭矩、峰值扭矩、间歇扭矩、额定扭矩、最大扭矩、转速范围、额定转速、最高转速、工作区间、S1/S2/S3 工作制、短时运行区、连续运行区、功率曲线、效率曲线等。典型特征是坐标轴、曲线、工作区域、转速单位 rpm/r/min、扭矩单位 Nm/N·m。
classification.reason: 目标区域是电机技术数据表，包含可见的 'Rated Torque Tn (N. m)'、'Maximum torque Tm (N.m)'、'Rated Speed Nn (rpm)'、额定电流、功率等性能参数；虽非曲线图，但在给定类别中最接近电机扭矩与转速性能信息。

classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标裁剪区域是电机侧视外形及轴端结构尺寸图，包含中心线、外形轮廓、键槽示意以及可见尺寸标注如'40'、'KEY'、'φ110 0 -0.03'、'φ22 0 -0.011'、'55±1'、'199±1.5'、'153'等，用于表达机械安装和外形尺寸。

text_annotations.correction_note: OCR read as 9; corrected to 6 based on visible top key cross-section dimension.
Removed trailing OCR dot from dimension text.
Restored diameter symbol and normalized unilateral tolerance from visible vertical diameter callout.
Normalized diameter symbol and unilateral tolerance.

terminology_notes: Unilateral tolerances are normalized as upper/lower deviation.
translation_notes: KEY translated as key feature label.

Top key detail shows the vertical width dimension of the key as 6.
Small top cross-section detail shows a horizontal dimension corrected from OCR 9 to visible 6.
Visible text label identifies the top detail as the key feature, not a numeric dimension.

Lower left axial callout marks a short step at the mounting flange face.
Lower axial dimension marks the front mounting flange thickness as 12.
Bottom dimension from shaft end to front mounting reference defines shaft extension length.
Bottom long dimension spans the motor body length from front flange reference to rear end.

engineering_summary.shaft_and_key_interface: Shaft interface includes Φ22 0/-0.011 shaft diameter, 55±1 mm shaft extension, and key detail dimensions 40 mm and 6 mm.
engineering_summary.overall_envelope_and_clearance: Motor body length is 199±1.5 mm and overall body height is 153 mm.
engineering_summary.connector_considerations: Top connector is visible in the drawing, but no connector text dimensions are present in this crop.
engineering_summary.missing_or_unresolved_data: No hole pattern, bolt size, or connector pin data is specified in this cropped region.

classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标区域是电机前端法兰和安装孔的结构视图，包含'φ145±0.1'、'M6 DEEP20'、'4-φ9'、'2-130'、'45°'等孔径、螺纹深度、孔距和角度尺寸；顶部仅标注'6 PIN MOTOR CONNECTOR'与'17 PIN ENCODER CONNECTOR'的外形位置，没有针脚功能或接线定义，因此归入机械尺寸。

text_annotations.correction_note: Restored diameter symbol from visible callout.
Merged stacked thread size and depth callout.
Corrected OCR 4-9 to visible diameter callout 4-φ9.

terminology_notes: DEEP20 denotes hole/thread depth of 20 mm.

dimension_records.reason: Top-left visible label identifies the motor connector interface.
Top-right visible label identifies the encoder connector interface.
Diameter callout with leader points to the circular mounting hole pattern.
Stacked M6 and DEEP20 callout points to threaded mounting holes.
Callout uses standard quantity-diameter notation for four mounting holes.
Both 45° callouts describe angular orientation of the mounting pattern.
Bottom dimension line indicates paired 130 mm mounting spacing.

engineering_summary.mounting_interface: Front mounting pattern includes φ145±0.1 pitch circle, 4-φ9 holes, M6 deep 20 threaded holes, 45° angular offsets, and 2-130 spacing.
engineering_summary.connector_considerations: Visible labels identify 6 PIN MOTOR CONNECTOR and 17 PIN ENCODER CONNECTOR.
engineering_summary.missing_or_unresolved_data: Thread quantity for M6 holes is not explicitly stated in the visible callout.

classification.category_basis: 用于识别电机性能曲线类图纸或图表，包括扭矩-转速曲线、转速-扭矩关系、连续扭矩、峰值扭矩、间歇扭矩、额定扭矩、最大扭矩、转速范围、额定转速、最高转速、工作区间、S1/S2/S3 工作制、短时运行区、连续运行区、功率曲线、效率曲线等。典型特征是坐标轴、曲线、工作区域、转速单位 rpm/r/min、扭矩单位 Nm/N·m。
classification.reason: 目标裁剪区域在完整图中对应左下角蓝框内的性能曲线，包含纵轴'T (N.m)'、横轴'n (rpm)'、转速刻度0到5000、扭矩刻度0到30，并标出'Intermittent'与'Continous'两条工作曲线及27.5、11、4700等关键数值，表达电机转矩随转速变化的连续和间歇工作范围。

text_annotations.correction_note: Selected complete higher-confidence reading over overlapping partial OCR '27.'.
Normalized punctuation/spacing from OCR 'T(N.m)' to visible axis label format.
Corrected OCR spelling 'Continous' to visible/engineering term 'Continuous'.
Selected complete horizontal tick label over overlapping rotated duplicate OCR.

drawing_metadata.unit_assumption: Graph units are explicitly shown as N·m and rpm where visible; no mm dimension unit applies to this crop

terminology_notes: Axis units N·m and rpm are preserved in text annotations but dimension record unit field uses Not specified because the provided schema only allows mm, degree, or Not specified.

dimension_records.reason: Visible vertical graph axis label defines torque quantity and unit; schema unit list does not include N·m, so unit is recorded as Not specified.
Merged split OCR components for the visible horizontal graph axis label; schema unit list does not include rpm, so unit is recorded as Not specified.

dimension_records.normalized_specification_en: Torque scale: 0 to 30 N·m, 5 N·m increments
dimension_records.normalized_specification_zh: 转矩刻度：0 至 30 N·m，步进 5 N·m
dimension_records.reason: Left-side tick labels form the torque scale of the plotted curve; schema unit list does not include N·m.

dimension_records.normalized_specification_en: Speed scale: 0 to 5000 rpm, 1000 rpm increments
dimension_records.normalized_specification_zh: 转速刻度：0 至 5000 rpm，步进 1000 rpm
dimension_records.reason: Bottom tick labels form the rotational speed scale of the plotted curve; schema unit list does not include rpm.

dimension_records.normalized_specification_en: Intermittent curve starts/plateaus at 27.5 N·m before decreasing with speed
dimension_records.normalized_specification_zh: 间歇转矩曲线起始/平台值为 27.5 N·m，随后随转速下降
dimension_records.reason: The label 'Intermittent' identifies the upper curve and 27.5 is the adjacent torque value on that curve; schema unit list does not include N·m.

dimension_records.normalized_specification_en: Continuous curve starts near 11 N·m before decreasing with speed
dimension_records.normalized_specification_zh: 连续转矩曲线起始约为 11 N·m，随后随转速下降
dimension_records.reason: The label 'Continuous' identifies the lower curve and 11 is the adjacent torque value on that curve; schema unit list does not include N·m.

dimension_records.normalized_specification_zh: 曲线末端标注转速 4700 rpm
dimension_records.reason: The value appears near the right-side curve termination and is interpreted as a speed callout; schema unit list does not include rpm.

frontend_table_records.specification: Torque scale: 0 to 30 N·m, 5 N·m increments
Speed scale: 0 to 5000 rpm, 1000 rpm increments
Intermittent curve starts/plateaus at 27.5 N·m before decreasing with speed
Continuous curve starts near 11 N·m before decreasing with speed

audit_table_records.normalized_specification: 转矩刻度：0 至 30 N·m，步进 5 N·m
转速刻度：0 至 5000 rpm，步进 1000 rpm
间歇转矩曲线起始/平台值为 27.5 N·m，随后随转速下降
连续转矩曲线起始约为 11 N·m，随后随转速下降
曲线末端标注转速 4700 rpm

unresolved_items.issue: OCR fragments/noise from grid lines, overlapping curve labels, or duplicate partial readings were not used as final annotations.

classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标区域是右侧技术数据表中的环境条件子表，包含'Temperature'、'Humidity'、'Environment'、'Installation altitude'及对应工作环境参数；不含扭矩转速曲线或连接器针脚定义。在给定类别中最接近机械图纸技术条件/尺寸类信息。

classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标裁剪区域位于图纸标题栏公差框，包含'UNLESS OTHERWISE SPECIFIED TOLERANCES:'、小数尺寸公差'.X ±0.5'、'.XX ±0.25'、'.XXX ±0.1'、角度公差'±0°30`'及单位'UNIT: mm'，属于机械图纸尺寸与公差信息。

quality_control.origin_src_semantics: 5x crop before structure border trim; backend original data image
quality_control.target_src_semantics: structure-only crop after border trim; backend processed data image

items: 抽查 5x 裁切图清晰度和结构图去边效果
抽查 AI 命名、分类、标签合并、完整翻译和简单翻译质量
抽查 v2 JSON 是否满足后台拆解对比和人工复核需要
